message:
fix(core): simplify timestamp formatting, reduce messaging allocation, and clean up test fixtures

Timestamp module (timestamps.rs):
- Simplify relative timestamp formatting by removing redundant intermediate
  allocations — format directly into the output string instead of building
  temporary Duration representations

ATC participation (atc_participation.rs):
- Fix minor type annotation consistency for participation tracking fields

Database pool (pool.rs):
- Add connection pool size logging at pool initialization for observability

Test fixtures (tests/common/mod.rs):
- Simplify test database setup by removing redundant schema re-initialization
  that duplicated what the pool already does on first connection

Mail UI (mail_ui.rs):
- Reduce allocation in message rendering by reusing string buffers for
  repeated formatting operations across message list items

Overseer template (overseer_compose.html):
- Clean up HTML template formatting and remove unused CSS class definitions

Messaging tools (messaging.rs):
- Reduce allocation in message construction by pre-sizing vectors based on
  known input counts instead of growing dynamically
- Simplify reply-chain resolution by using iterators instead of explicit
  loop-and-collect patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
